notes.message: Cool-gray palette applied across 8 studio files (tailwind + 6 Mac surfaces + 2 chrome primitives). canvas #F8F8F7 / pane #F1F1F0 / chrome #E7E7E6 / rail #DCDCDB / ink #232423. Accents (brass/amber) stayed warm.

Cool-gray palette applied across 8 studio files (tailwind + 6 Mac surfaces + 2 chrome primitives). canvas #F8F8F7 / pane #F1F1F0 / chrome #E7E7E6 / rail #DCDCDB / ink #232423. Accents (brass/amber) stayed warm.

ScopeCanvas off-canon: canvas #FBFBFA → #F8F8F7
Phase 1 ScopeDesign canon alignment in progress.
ScopeCanvas.canvas now uses cool-gray canon #F8F8F7; build verified with xcodebuild fallback because talkie-dev was not found.
ScopeCanvas.canvasAlt #F2F2F1 → #ECECEB
Phase 1 ScopeDesign canon alignment in progress.
ScopeCanvas.canvasAlt now uses cool-gray canon #ECECEB; build verified with xcodebuild fallback because talkie-dev was not found.
ScopeCanvas.surface #EDEDEC → #EFEFEE (paneLifted)
Phase 1 ScopeDesign canon alignment in progress.
ScopeCanvas.surface now uses canon paneLifted #EFEFEE; build verified with xcodebuild fallback because talkie-dev was not found.
Add ScopeBrass enum (solid #9A6A22, deep #7A521A) — referenced by ~40 Home call sites
Phase 1 ScopeDesign canon alignment in progress.
Added ScopeBrass.solid #9A6A22 and .deep #7A521A for warm instrument-metal accents.
Add ScopeKind enum: memo #9A6A22, dict #E89A3C, note #767674, capture #5C5E5C
Phase 1 ScopeDesign canon alignment in progress.
Added ScopeKind memo/dict/note/capture tints matching the 2026-05-21 studio canon.
ScopeInk 5-step ladder vs studio single ink — leave alone for now; collapse decision needs visual review
Intentional hold per the original brief: ScopeInk 5-step ladder serves a different layered purpose than studio single ink. Collapse decision deferred unless a concrete UI issue surfaces.
Replace 40 inline Color.hex("9A6A22")/Color.hex("7A521A") with ScopeBrass.solid / .deep
Phase 5 ScopeBrass/ScopeKind mechanical propagation in progress.
Replaced Home brass/deep inline literals with ScopeBrass.solid/deep and reused ScopeKind.dict for dict tint; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
RecentTwoPane.swift L88 contentTint #6B7A75 → ScopeKind.note
Phase 5 ScopeBrass/ScopeKind mechanical propagation in progress.
RecentTwoPane now uses ScopeBrass.solid for voice tint and ScopeKind.note for content tint; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Replace 6+ Rectangle().fill(ScopeEdge.faint).frame(height: 0.5) with ScopeRule(.section/.row/.subtle)
Phase 6 ScopeRule mechanical sweep in progress.
Added ScopeRule primitive and replaced Home/Recent hand-rolled row/section hairlines; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Drop leading '· ' from Eyebrow in ScopeComponents.swift L85 (or gate via accent:Bool)
Phase 7 trivial copy strip in progress.
Removed the default leading bullet from Scope Eyebrow and updated its doc comment; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Strip Did-you-know serif marketing hooks (L612-625) → neutral mono labels
Phase 7 trivial copy strip in progress.
Changed Home Did-you-know cards to neutral Tips labels with mono hook styling and non-marketing copy; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Demote Routines + Did-you-know to borderless rows on canvas (keep Bay + Recent as cards). NEEDS painter review.
DECISION: Bay + Recent stay as cards. Routines + Did-you-know demote to borderless rule-separated rows on canvas. Editorial weight collapses into the two primary bands.
Home painter resolution in progress.

Demoted Home Routines and Tips/Did-you-know from card chrome to borderless rule-separated rows on canvas while keeping Bay and Recent as the primary card-weight bands; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Delete ~400 lines: libraryReadoutPanel, ReadoutSurface, LibraryReadoutBodyVariant, variantSwitcherStrip (L684–1880). Already flagged dead at L731-739.
Deleting dead Library readout-bay scaffolding.
Deleted dead Library readout-bay/debug variant scaffolding and rebuilt Talkie with xcodebuild fallback.
Rewrite file header L5-10 — no more 'cream-phosphor' / 'tape archive' / 'amber ON FILE'
Phase 7 trivial copy strip in progress.
Rewrote the Library file header to remove cream-phosphor/tape-archive/amber ON FILE language; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Promote readout source tints (#6B4FBB, #0B1418, #15191E, #2A3138, #5FE3C9) to ScopePanel ext or ScopeReadout namespace
Library mechanical leftovers in progress.
Verified the readout source tint literals are no longer live in ScopeLibraryView after the readout-bay removal; no ScopeReadout namespace needed. Library build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Replace ~6 hand-rolled hairlines with ScopeRule(...)
Phase 6 ScopeRule mechanical sweep in progress.
Replaced Library top/footer/list row hairlines with ScopeRule section/row roles; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
De-amber chrome: bucket eyebrows → ScopeInk.muted, dividers → ScopeEdge.faint, pagination dots → ScopeInk.faint
Library mechanical leftovers in progress.
Demoted Library bucket eyebrows to ScopeInk.muted, pagination dots to ScopeInk.faint, and made the bucket divider explicitly ScopeEdge.faint; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Strip marketing subtitle L632-641 'Hyper+M to record.' etc. → single neutral label
Phase 7 trivial copy strip in progress.
Replaced Library empty-state Hyper shortcut marketing strings with one neutral no-items label; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Wire ScopeLibraryRow.channelColor (L1485-1493) to ScopeKind instead of amber-only memo
Phase 5 ScopeBrass/ScopeKind mechanical propagation in progress.
Library row channel colors now dispatch to ScopeKind memo/dict/note/capture instead of amber-only/ink fallbacks; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
HIGHEST PRIORITY: Replace warm chiffon gradient L287-297 #FAF7EF → #FAF6EB → #F7F2E5 with ScopeCanvas.canvas — visible 'pale cream' regression user flagged
Phase 2 TalkieView pale-cream regression fix in progress.
Replaced TalkieView warm chiffon gradient (#FAF7EF/#FAF6EB/#F7F2E5) with ScopeCanvas.canvas; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Update stale comments L118-120, L150, L283-286 — drop 'chiffon paper' language
Phase 2 TalkieView pale-cream regression fix in progress.
Removed stale chiffon-paper wording around the Talkie detail surface; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Adopt ScopeRule(.section/.row/.subtle) in TOHeaderSection / TOSharedComponents for dividers
Phase 6 ScopeRule mechanical sweep in progress.
Replaced Talkie detail header/shared component hairline dividers with ScopeRule roles; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Drop overlay L259-277: use ScopeAmber.solid/tint + ScopeType.eyebrow instead of settings.resolvedAccentColor + Theme.current.fontSM
TalkieView mechanical leftovers in progress.
Rebound the TalkieView drop overlay to ScopeAmber and ScopeType tokens instead of settings/Theme ad hoc tokens; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.

Follow-up token pass: TalkieObject drop overlay now uses ThemedScopeAccent/ThemedScopeCanvas so the Scope-styled drop state keeps the canonical amber in Scope but adapts to dark/non-Scope themes instead of pinning static Scope inks.
Add ScopeRule(.subtle, axis:.vertical) between body and margin rail
Phase 6 ScopeRule mechanical sweep in progress.
Added ScopeRule subtle vertical divider between Talkie detail body and margin rail; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Replace PageLayout.headerHeight + 18 magic number with PageLayout.headerOverlayClearance
TalkieView mechanical leftovers in progress.
Added PageLayout.headerOverlayClearance and replaced the TalkieView header clearance magic number; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Follow-up checked during the detail-theme pass; no new header-clearance magic-number change was needed. The related TalkieView follow-up was limited to theme-aware drop-overlay tokens.
Delete NoteToken enum entirely; bind to ScopeCanvas / ScopeInk / ScopeEdge / ScopeBrass / ScopeAmber
Blocked for clean commit hygiene: ScopeNoteDetailView.swift is currently untracked, so deleting NoteToken would require committing the entire new file unless arach confirms ownership.
Note detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Deleted NoteToken and rebound Note detail colors/rules to ScopeCanvas/ScopeInk/ScopeEdge/ScopeBrass/ScopeAmber/ScopeKind; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Body ink.opacity(0.88) → ScopeInk.dim directly (no opacity layering on warm ink)
Note detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Replaced note body ink opacity layering with ScopeInk.dim; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Attachment rail bg #F2EDDE → ScopeCanvas.surface (#EFEFEE) or ScopeRule(.row) for top hairline
Note detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Replaced the warm attachment rail with ScopeCanvas.surface and ScopeRule(.row); build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Strip fake 'CH-04 · NOTE' channel label — show real note.source.displayName or nothing. NEEDS painter decision.
DECISION: Drop the fake CH-04 chip. If note.source.displayName exists, render it as a mono eyebrow (no channel framing). If not, render nothing.
Note painter resolutions in progress.
Dropped the fake CH-04 note channel chip and render only real note source as an unframed mono eyebrow when available; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Replace synthetic N-#### sequence from hashValue — real persistent ID or drop chip. NEEDS painter decision.
DECISION: Drop the synthetic N-#### chip entirely. Only show a sequence chip when we have a real persistent ID. Until then, no chip.
Note painter resolutions in progress.
Removed the synthetic N-#### hash-derived sequence chip; no sequence renders until a real persistent note ID exists. Build verified via xcodebuild fallback.

Applied the same painter decision to Capture detail: removed the C-/S- hashValue-derived sequence chip and fallback filename dependency; no capture/selection sequence renders until a persistent display ID exists.
Empty-state italic serif 'none yet' → mono 9pt at ScopeInk.faint
Note detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Changed empty attachment text from italic serif to mono 9pt ScopeInk.faint; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Delete CapToken enum; bind to ScopeCanvas / ScopeInk / ScopeEdge
Blocked for clean commit hygiene: ScopeCaptureDetailView.swift is currently untracked, so deleting CapToken would require committing the entire new file unless arach confirms ownership.
Capture detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Deleted CapToken and rebound Capture detail colors/rules to ScopeCanvas/ScopeInk/ScopeEdge/ScopeBrass/ScopeAmber/ScopeKind; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Image mat #F2EDDE → ScopeCanvas.surface (#EFEFEE); drop warm matAlt #E8DFC8
Capture detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Replaced warm image mats/rails with ScopeCanvas.surface and dropped matAlt by deleting CapToken; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Promote captureTint #5A7A86 to ScopeKind.capture (#5C5E5C) — currently local one-off
Capture detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Replaced local capture tint with ScopeKind.capture; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Strip 'promotes to a note' italic narration; keep '+ ADD CAPTION' with ⌘N hint
Capture detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Removed the promote-to-note italic narration while keeping + ADD CAPTION and ⌘N; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Promote derivedCaption to serif headline; demote filename to mono byline. NEEDS painter visual treatment.
DECISION: Promote derivedCaption to serif headline (top); demote filename to mono byline below. Matches 'document on a desk' framing — caption is the editorial title, filename is provenance.
Capture painter resolution in progress.
Promoted image captures' derivedCaption into the serif headline position and demoted filename/dimensions/filesize into mono provenance byline; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.

Final PR #15 follow-up: Capture detail remains caption-as-serif-headline / filename-as-mono-byline, but the headline, byline, action rail, attachment/mat colors, and foot rail now resolve through theme-aware detail tokens. The unstable hash-derived capture/selection chip was also removed until a real persistent display ID exists.
Fix stray hairline inside eyebrow row (Rectangle inside HStack stretches incorrectly)
Capture detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Replaced the eyebrow HStack hairline with ScopeRule(.subtle) so it no longer uses a stray stretching Rectangle; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Foot action tone.opacity(0.75) → drop the 0.75 multiplier; use ScopeInk.muted for neutral
Capture detail token refactor in progress now that tracked draft landed.
Dropped the 0.75 foreground opacity multiplier and used ScopeInk.muted for the neutral footer action; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Delete SkillsToken enum; bind to ScopeCanvas / ScopeInk / ScopeAmber / ScopePanel
Deleting SkillsToken and rebinding usages to ScopeDesign tokens.
Deleted SkillsToken and rebound usages to ScopeCanvas/ScopeInk/ScopeEdge/ScopeAmber/ScopeBrass tokens; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
voicePreview hardcoded #0E1518 / #F4F1EA → ScopePanel.bg / .ink / .trace
Skills mechanical leftovers in progress.
Rebound voicePreview dark panel colors to ScopePanel.bg/ink/trace tokens; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Replace 12 hand-rolled Rectangle().fill(SkillsToken.inkRuleSoft).frame(height:1) with ScopeRule(.subtle)/.row
Phase 6 ScopeRule mechanical sweep in progress.
Replaced tracked Skills hand-rolled ScopeEdge separators/gutters with ScopeRule subtle roles; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Ration amber: demote AGENT eyebrow, console arrows, miniChip borders, mic hover, one of RUN/SAVE to ink/brass. NEEDS painter pick of 3 amber slots.
DECISION: Keep amber on RUN, SAVE, and mic hover (the three primary user affordances). Demote AGENT eyebrow + console arrows + miniChip borders to ScopeInk.muted / ScopeBrass.solid.
Skills amber-ration painter resolution in progress.

Kept amber on RUN/SAVE/mic hover while demoting AGENT eyebrow, console prompt arrows/command text, and miniChip active chrome to ScopeInk.muted/ScopeBrass.solid; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Standardize section gaps to SkillsSpacing.sectionGap token (currently 14 vs 32 inconsistent)
Skills mechanical leftovers in progress.
Added SkillsSpacing.sectionGap and routed section/bottom spacing through the token; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Cut footer paragraph (marketing) to one-line italic byline or remove
Phase 7 trivial copy strip in progress.
Removed the Skills footer marketing paragraph, leaving only the section rule; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.
Add .accessibilityLabel to inlineMic and submitButton
Skills mechanical leftovers in progress.
Added accessibility labels to the inline mic and submit controls; build verified via xcodebuild fallback.

Final contrast follow-up: Note detail action/attachment rail colors now route through ThemedScopeInk/Accent/Canvas, so buttons and chips remain readable outside the Scope light substrate.
Closed by cool-gray ScopeInk ladder (canon 2026-05-21). ScopeInk.muted / faint / dim provide the right contrast steps; legacy near-floor mono labels lifted to ScopeInk.muted via token migration.

Final contrast follow-up: Capture detail action rail, add-caption chip, metadata values, and foot actions now route through ThemedScopeInk/Accent/Canvas, so they remain readable outside the Scope light substrate.
Closed by cool-gray ScopeInk ladder (canon 2026-05-21). ScopeInk.muted / faint / dim provide the right contrast steps; legacy near-floor mono labels lifted to ScopeInk.muted via token migration.

Final contrast follow-up: memo/dictation detail brass/amber cues, JSON dismissal action, margin rail accents, and player rail linework now route through ThemedScopeAccent/ThemedScopeRule for dark-theme legibility.
Closed by Sweep 1 cool-gray substrate. The warm cream over-saturation that made mono labels feel heavy is gone — cool canvas reads cleaner under mono type.
Closed by Scope cool-gray canon (lib/scope-tokens.ts). Substrate hierarchy is canvas → pane → paneLifted → chrome → rail; one source of truth, semantic naming.
Decision shipped 2026-05-21. Substrate pivoted from warm cream to cool neutral gray. See lib/scope-tokens.ts + project_scope_canon_2026_05_21.md memory.
Closed by studio-chrome rationing. Scheme picker now reads as audition chrome, not primary affordance — sized down and demoted in StudioNav.
Closed by codex Phase 5 (sw-home-eyebrow-bullet). Leading '·' on SectionBlock eyebrows dropped — Swift and studio both clean.
Closed by painter decision sw-home-card-equal-weight + Bay header demotion. Vertical rhythm now has primary (Bay, Recent) vs secondary (Routines, Did-you-know) bands.
Closed by painter decision sw-home-card-equal-weight + Bay header demotion. Vertical rhythm now has primary (Bay, Recent) vs secondary (Routines, Did-you-know) bands.
Closed by ScopeKind tint + ScopeRule.action (codex Phases 5+6). Selected row gets kind-tinted left edge + cool wash; lock-in reads clearly.
Closed by codex Phase 5/7 (sw-lib-strip-subtitle, sw-lib-de-amber). Bucket headers de-amber'd; fill dropped; ScopeRule.subtle top rule with mono label floated left.
Closed by mono cluster + ScopeRule.action active dot. Pills tightened to single label·count form; active state uses leading ScopeRule.action mark.
Closed by codex sw-lib-channel-color-kind (commit f0cac6b). Channel chip now bound to ScopeKind enum across kinds, not amber-only.
Closed by codex Phase 4 (sw-lib-delete-readout-bay, commit 6ec197d). ~940 lines of dead readout-bay scaffolding deleted; orphan code gone.
Closed under broader a11y pass. Decorative middots are aria-hidden via component primitive; structural separators use proper role.
Closed by codex Phase 6 ScopeRule sweep + sw-dict-rail-rule + sw-dict-rules-adopt (commit 35ebece). TalkieView dividers now use ScopeRule primitives; margin-rail divider added.
Closed by codex Phase 6 ScopeRule sweep + sw-dict-rail-rule + sw-dict-rules-adopt (commit 35ebece). TalkieView dividers now use ScopeRule primitives; margin-rail divider added.
Closed by codex sw-dict-overlay-token. Action overlay uses ScopeAmber.solid/tint + ScopeType.eyebrow tokens; no more inline accent/font references.
Closed by codex Phase 7 marketing copy strips + sw-dict-stale-comments. Stale 'chiffon paper' language dropped; serif paragraph narrowed to title-only role.
Closed by ScopeType.eyebrow + mono byline conventions applied across detail surfaces. Field labels read as instrument legend.
Closed by painter decisions sw-note-sequence-fake-id + sw-cap-filename-headline (synthetic IDs dropped; derivedCaption promoted to headline). Same pattern applied to Dict detail.
Closed by painter decisions sw-note-sequence-fake-id + sw-cap-filename-headline (synthetic IDs dropped; derivedCaption promoted to headline). Same pattern applied to Dict detail.
Closed by codex sw-note-empty-state-italic + sw-note-attachment-rail (commit c968b23). Empty-state mono 9pt at ScopeInk.faint; attachment rail uses ScopeCanvas.surface + ScopeRule(.row).
Closed by editorial document framing (document_not_dashboard memory). Serif lede replaced by eyebrow + serif headline + mono byline convention.
Closed by codex Phase 5/7 + cool-gray canon. Toolbar eyebrow reads as instrument label; no marketing tone.
Closed by codex Phase 6 ScopeRule sweep + sw-cap-hairline-stretch fix (commit c5b0742). Stray Rectangle hairlines replaced with ScopeRule; HStack stretch bug fixed.
Closed by painter decision sw-cap-filename-headline. derivedCaption → serif headline; filename → mono byline. Document-on-a-desk framing applied.
Closed by ScopePanel + scopeCardBorder + ScopeType conventions. Margin symmetry and mono tracking standardized via primitives.
Closed by ScopePanel + scopeCardBorder + ScopeType conventions. Margin symmetry and mono tracking standardized via primitives.
Closed by cool-gray substrate + ScopeInk ladder. Mono labels at ScopeInk.muted/faint read as instrument legend rather than dominant body.
Closed by Skills surface refactor (commits fa2188d + earlier). Editor bay reads as primary; chrome rails subordinated.
Closed by SkillsSpacing.sectionGap standardization (sw-sk-section-gap-token, future commit). Section gaps consistent; pipeline rows have breathing room.
Closed by Phase 7 marketing copy strips (commit f673ea6) + ScopeType conventions. Italic serif removed from chrome; mono carries the byline.

PR #15 follow-up: independent review and Arach confirmation found editorial detail views using Scope-canonical inks/canvases directly, making title/byline/actions/sequence chips/player labels nearly invisible in dark themes.

Added theme-aware Scope detail tokens (ThemedScopeCanvas/Ink/Edge/Accent/Rule) and routed memo, note, capture, playback, margin rail, media, notes, readout, and drop-overlay detail colors through Theme.current while preserving Scope canon when Scope is active. Dark memo detail screenshot verified readable; fallback macOS rebuild + relaunch succeeded.
